owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists. New approved direction: prove the smallest legal reactive policy-pack slice so a loaded mod can react in-session through precompiled branches.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; reactive policy-pack chunks supersede polish/convenience chunks when generated-overlay gameplay effect is the blocker; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: Owner-approved zero-history unknown-campaign bootstrap policy-pack direction plus REACTIVE_POLICY_PACK_ARCHITECTURE.md

chunks.title: Expose zero-history bootstrap policy-pack source quality
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Core Runtime Skeleton / unknown campaign zero-history bootstrap
chunks.goal: Make generated overlay/status evidence distinguish history-backed campaign rules from zero-history bootstrap defaults, and prepare deterministic manifest-visible bootstrap rotation so new campaigns do not reuse the same fixed slot personalities forever.
acceptance: Generated overlay manifest or adjacent status evidence can report `history_backed`, `zero_history_bootstrap`, or `generic_unknown_campaign_fallback` source quality.
Bootstrap variation uses a deterministic recorded policy-pack seed or rotation epoch; it does not use local username, machine id, account id, or raw private paths.
Known campaign personalities are not rerolled by the bootstrap mechanism.
Targeted regression coverage verifies that zero-history source-quality metadata is present and that known/history-backed rules remain distinguishable.

chunks.title: Add minimal reactive policy-pack event-family DSL slice
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Core Runtime Skeleton / generated reactive policy pack
chunks.goal: Prove the smallest safe near-realtime path: validated DSL can represent one allowlisted event-family branch, the compiler rejects unknown/raw event families, and generated overlay/status evidence shows whether the pack is reactive-capable.
acceptance: DSL/validator supports at least one allowlisted event family without exposing raw Stellaris script or raw on_action names to model output.
Generated overlay manifest or status evidence records reactive policy-pack/event-family coverage.
Unknown event family, raw on_action-like names, or tactical/live-control branch requests fail closed.
Targeted regression coverage verifies accepted and rejected event-family branches.

chunks.title: Surface SNC lifecycle contract in tray JSON
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Core Runtime Skeleton / companion lifecycle skeleton visibility
chunks.goal: Expose the remaining lifecycle skeleton fields in `snc_tray_status.json` so tray-facing tooling can read the close-to-tray, explicit-exit, and crash-restart contract without reconstructing it from other artifacts.
acceptance: The tray JSON field names and values stay aligned with the snapshot JSON lifecycle object and the stable CLI lifecycle fields.
Regression coverage fails closed if the lifecycle tray JSON contract drifts or disappears.

chunks.title: Refresh progress after SNC lifecycle tray JSON slice
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Task Board And Owner Report Log
chunks.goal: Keep roadmap notes, sprint queue, and owner-facing daily summary aligned after the SNC lifecycle-contract tray JSON slice lands.
acceptance: Roadmap next-worker-ready notes mention the shipped SNC lifecycle-contract tray JSON surface once tests pass.
The sprint queue is refreshed to the next bounded roadmap slice instead of leaving stale completed chunks.
The daily freework report is replaced without creating report spam.
